calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-26-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Petitioner: Alicia Coraza-Gutierrez, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: April Alonso, was sworn and examined.

Order dispensing with notice is in the court's file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: April Coraza-Gutierrez.
Decree signed in open court.
